delete_pc.body:
Delete all parental controls?

This wipes the PIN and every restriction, and cannot be undone.

unlink.body: Unlink the companion app (Nintendo Switch Parental Controls) from this console?

play_timer.title: Play timer

gate.body:
The play timer is currently active.

Writing a new limit needs parental controls to be temporarily turned off first.

Turn parental controls off temporarily and write now?

play_timer.did_unlock_notice:
Parental controls are temporarily off.

Return to the main menu; the new limit takes effect once parental controls are active again.

perday.title: Per-day play-time limits
perday.section_days: Per-day limits (A to edit; (*) marks staged changes)

init_error.title: NX Pctl Manager
init_error.headline: Could not open the parental-control service.
init_error.body: This homebrew only works on a console running CFW (Atmosphère); a stock retail console can't open the pctl service.

toast.unlink_err: Could not unlink the companion app
